name: REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX
description_short: REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.9/5 with 756 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX is a credit repair provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. With 756 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a finance broker, financial consultant, financial institution, REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Miami, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering REPARACION DE CREDITO - CREDFIXX should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
